text_original:
My husband is complacent and self-satisfied,
Moving about with his left hand occupied.
Complacent and self-satisfied is my husband,
And right is his heart.
text_normalized:
My husband is complacent and self-satisfied,
Moving about with his left hand occupied.
Complacent and self-satisfied is my husband,
And right is his heart.
